title: Developmental milestone review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Defines the 1-month-to-6-year population and requires parent history, age-specific physical examination, vital signs, developmental milestones, screening, vaccination discussion, and EMR documentation.

source.title: Standard for Well-Child Visits
source.population: Children aged 1 month to 6 years attending well-child visit screening services.
source.setting: DoH-licensed healthcare facilities providing well-child visit screening services in Abu Dhabi.
source.exclusions: Direct for age-specific well-child screening in Abu Dhabi; partial for children outside the stated age range and for symptom-led growth or developmental presentations. The published copy states an effective date of TBD.

exact_location.heading: 1. Standard Scope; 3.1 History Components; 3.2 Comprehensive Physical Examination

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines the 1-month-to-6-year population and requires parent history, age-specific physical examination, vital signs, developmental milestones, screening, vaccination discussion, and EMR documentation.

assessment.text: Defines the 1-month-to-6-year population and requires parent history, age-specific physical examination, vital signs, developmental milestones, screening, vaccination discussion, and EMR documentation.
assessment.rationale: Supports age-specific milestones, parent history, examination and documentation for developmental milestone review; no decision is generated.

assessment.text: Defines developmental and autism screening prompts, parent concern, walking, speech and social domains, and referral pathways for concerning screening results.
assessment.rationale: Supports motor, speech, social, autism-screening and referral context for developmental milestone review; no decision is generated.
